neqsim.process.research.OperationOption

Package
Description
neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

    Method
    Description
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addCompressionCoolingSeparationTrain(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds a compression, cooling, and polishing-separator train when the needed units are allowed.
    private void
    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addOperationOptionCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<OperationOption> operationOptions, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds candidates from explicit process-network operation options.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addPhaseSplitOption(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds a direct phase-split option when separators are allowed.
    private void
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addPressureLetdownOption(ProcessResearchSpec spec, String targetMaterial, List<OperationOption> options)
    Adds pressure-letdown options for expansion/JT screening.

    ProcessCandidateGenerator.addProcessNetworkPathCandidates(ProcessResearchSpec spec, List<OperationOption> operationOptions, List<ProcessCandidate> candidates)
    Adds graph-enumerated process-network path candidates.

    Adds direct heater and cooler conditioning options.

    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary.addUnique(List<OperationOption> options, OperationOption candidate)
